GenAiPlugin.description: Topic guidance for logging Medical Insights from field dictation.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: When the user dictates field feedback, convert it into a clear Medical Insight draft and preserve the user's core clinical and business details. Include concise hints for account/product/subject extraction when present. If the input lacks meaningful medical context, ask for one clarifying detail before saving.

GenAiPlugin.scope: In scope: capturing real field medical insights. Out of scope: non-medical chatter and unrelated admin tasks.
